child.description: This is your money page. Your parent set it up so you can see savings and pocket money — tap the buttons to get around.
child.steps: Tap My Money to see savings jars|Tap Accounts to link a bank with a parent|Tap Settings if you need help from a grown-up

teen.description: Track your allowance, savings jars, and spending. Use the menu at the bottom on your phone, or the menu on the left on a larger screen.
teen.steps: Check My Money for jars and allowance|Link a bank from Accounts|See spending in Transactions

parent.description: Manage family money in one place. Link banks, invite your partner, and keep an eye on the children — each section below is a main area.
parent.steps: Link banks in Accounts|Invite family in Family|Set budgets in Budgets|Switch spaces with the dropdown at the top left

business.description: Track cash, burn rate, and subscriptions. Link your business bank first, then review transactions and SaaS spend.
business.steps: Open Business for runway|Link accounts|Review SaaS in Subscriptions

general.description: Welcome! Start by linking a bank, then explore transactions and budgets. On your phone, use the bar at the bottom; on desktop, use the menu on the left.
general.steps: Link a bank in Accounts|See activity in Transactions|Track limits in Budgets

accounts.subtitleSimple: Link your bank here to see balances and transactions automatically.
accounts.steps: Tap Link your first bank|Sign in with your bank (UK, EU, or US)|Come back here — balances usually appear within a minute
accounts.bankRegionNote: Link UK and European banks (via Plaid) or US banks (via Stripe Financial Connections). We never store your bank login — only read-only balances and transactions.
accounts.teenSubtitle: Link your bank to track spending and see where your money goes.
accounts.teenEmptyDescription: Link your bank account to sync transactions and unlock spending insights. Only you and your guardians can see this account.

household.description: Me and my partner — shared budgets, separate or joint accounts.

family.addChildDescription: Create a login for your child or teen. They sign in with email and password.
family.splitsHint: Set up how shared expenses are split between guardians in Settings → Split rules.

company.footnote: Runway = cash on hand ÷ net monthly burn. Keep business accounts in this space only.

setup.title: Set up your business dashboard
setup.subtitle: Three steps to see runway, SaaS waste, and cloud spend — all from your business bank.

team.inviteDesc: We'll text an invite link and verification code to their mobile. Email is optional.
team.phoneHelp: Required — we send an SMS invite and verification code.

teen.subtitle: Your savings and goals
teen.noJars: No savings jars yet. Ask your guardian to set one up!

settings.phoneHelp: Used for SMS verification via Twilio. International format (E.164): country code, then the number without the leading 0. Example: 07700 900123 → +447700900123.
settings.phoneFormatHint: Drop the leading 0 after the country code (e.g. +447700900123, not +4407700900123).
settings.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number (e.g. +447700900123 or +33612345678)

transactions.subtitle: {count} transactions in your active space — search, filter, and export.

subscriptions.shieldDescription: FlowRate monitors your subscriptions for price changes and unused services. You'll be notified as soon as something changes.

invite.loginHint: Sign in with {email} and the password you just created.
